subcodes.first_line: O summoner to the Covenant! I have perused what thou hadst written to Mírza Aḥmad. I inhaled a sweet fragrance from the gardens of its meanings… In the Dispensation of Abraham, by “immolation” was meant attainment to the station of sacrifice, not butchery and the shedding of blood.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان آنچه که بجناب میرزا احمد مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید از ریاض
subcodes.subjects: @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @station of the Manifestation of God
